challenge.title: Korak 4
challenge.description:
Sada je vreme da kreirate instance vaše klase MusicalInstrument.

Da biste kreirali instancu klase, pozivate ime klase kao funkciju, prosleđujući potrebne argumente za metod __init__ (osim self, koji je automatski obrađen od strane Pythona).

my_instance = ClassName(arg1, arg2)

Kada kreirate ovu instancu, Python poziva vaš metod __init__ i skladišti vrednosti kao instance atribute koji pripadaju samo ovoj specifičnoj instanci.

Izvan definicije klase, kreirajte instancu pod imenom instrument_1 za Oboe koji je woodwind instrument.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should create an instance of the MusicalInstrument class named instrument_1.
You should pass Oboe and woodwind as arguments when creating instrument_1.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
class MusicalInstrument:
    def __init__(self, name, instrument_type):
        self.name = name
        self.instrument_type = instrument_type

    def play(self):
        print(f'The {self.name} is fun to play!')

    def get_fact(self):
        return f'The {self.name} is part of the {self.instrument_type} family of instruments.'

instrument_1 = MusicalInstrument('Oboe', 'woodwind')
instrument_2 = MusicalInstrument('Trumpet', 'brass')

instrument_1.play()              # The Oboe is fun to play!
print(instrument_1.get_fact())   # The Oboe is part of the woodwind family of instruments.

instrument_2.play()              # The Trumpet is fun to play!
print(instrument_2.get_fact())   # The Trumpet is part of the brass family of instruments.
